title: paeonia russoi var. coriacea
intro: Paeonia russoi var. coriacea, also known as the Chinese peony, is a plant species that belongs to the Paeoniaceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects, which are derived from its roots and flowers. The plant is used to treat a variety of health issues, including menstrual cramps, anxiety, insomnia, and digestive problems, due to its ability to regulate the body's physiological responses and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Paeonia russoi var. coriacea include dried roots and flowers, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall well-being.
